title: Pumping Lemma Proof Strategy for Regular Languages
description: A flowchart demonstrating the adversarial process of using the Pumping Lemma to prove a language is not regular.
elements: Adversary Chooses String s in L (|s| >= p)
We Find i such that xyⁱz is not in L
relationships: Flow from Choose p -> Adversary Chooses s
Flow from Adversary Chooses s -> We Partition s
Flow from We Partition s -> We Find i
Flow from We Find i -> Contradiction Achieved
